But that night's results have suddenly bound the California governor and the New York City mayor-elect together as two of the most prominent figures on the left -- two ...

title: Girl are we gonna talk about it?": It seems Debra Messing would rather we forget about her Mamdani meltdown"
description: The "Will & Grace" star hasn't addressed her crash out over Zohran Mamdani.

title: Zohran Mamdani says he'll reach out to Trump before taking office: 'This is a relationship that will be critical'
description: Mamdani, 34, didn't specify when he would contact the administration, but said he would be "proactive" as he tries to thwart Trump's hard-line immigration and crime policies.

title: NYC restaurateur cancels expansion plans following Zohran Mamdani victory: 'I'm not signing'
description: "We just don't feel that this mayor is suitable to supporting small businesses," restaurateur Stratis Morfogen told The Post
